idea-plugin.name: AzDTasks
idea-plugin.description:
Azure DevOps Tasks Integration

Integrates Azure DevOps work items directly into your JetBrains IDE, letting you browse, track, and manage tasks without leaving the editor.

Features

  • Task Repository Integration – Connect to Azure DevOps as a native IDE task repository; search work items by title, description, or ID from the Open Task dialog.
  • Current Sprint Panel – Dedicated tool window showing your assigned work items for the current iteration, with auto-refresh.
  • Work Item State Management – Transition work items through their workflow states (e.g. Active → Resolved) directly from the IDE.
  • Time Tracking – Log time spent on tasks back to a configurable Azure DevOps numeric field.
  • Work Item Type Icons – Displays the native Azure DevOps icon for each work item type (Bug, Task, User Story, etc.).
  • PAT Authentication – Authenticates using a Personal Access Token with minimal required scopes.

Setup

  1. Go to Settings → Tools → Tasks → Servers and add a new Azure DevOps server.
  2. Enter your organization name (e.g. {@code myorg} from {@code dev.azure.com/myorg}).
  3. Create a Personal Access Token in Azure DevOps with Work Items (Read & Write) scope and paste it in.
  4. Click Test Connection — project and team dropdowns will populate automatically.
  5. Select your project and team, then save.

The Azure Tasks tool window (right panel) will show your current sprint items and refresh automatically.
